## Checklist
- [ ] One concern per PR (unrelated changes split out)
- [ ] Builds on Windows (MSVC) **and** Linux (FUSE)
- [ ] `ctest` passes
- [ ] Verified against a real dump (named above)
- [ ] Docs under `docs/` updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Matches the code style in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
